about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Get to know Butcher Shop Šiško
about.storyText: Butcher Shop Šiško is a family business in the heart of Čajetina. For years, we have nurtured the tradition of authentic homemade grill, using only the freshest meat and proven recipes.
about.specialtiesText: We are known for our mixed grill meat, juicy burgers and ćevapi. Every dish is made with love and care, just as generations before us did.
about.atmosphereText: Wooden interior, warm atmosphere and the aroma of grilled meat — you feel at home with us. The perfect place for a family lunch in Čajetina.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Take a look at our dishes and ambiance

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: How to find us
location.directionsText: We are located in the center of Čajetina, on the main road to Zlatibor. Easy to find — look for our recognizable storefront!
location.parkingText: Free parking in front of the restaurant.

fun.kidsQuizDesc: Fun questions for our youngest guests!

fun.buildMealDesc: Create your perfect meal and see how much it costs!

footer.madeWith: Company founded in 2007 with a clear goal and determination.
